description_long: This is a ceramic cup with a cylindrical body and a single, rounded handle attached to one side. The exterior is decorated with a bold, abstract black and white pattern, featuring sweeping lines and geometric motifs. The rim of the cup is slightly uneven, and the interior appears glazed with a greenish-blue tint. The cup sits on a flat base, and the handle is ergonomically shaped for gripping. The surface finish is mostly matte with some glossy highlights, especially on the interior glaze. The cup is shown resting on a surface that resembles sheet music, but this is not part of the cup itself.
description: A ceramic cup with a black and white abstract pattern, a rounded handle, and a greenish-blue glazed interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle on the right and the main decorative pattern clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled view with the handle partially visible and the cup's rim and interior glaze more apparent.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the left, highlighting the continuous abstract pattern and the cup's cylindrical shape.
description_view_3: Rear view with the handle not visible, focusing on the uninterrupted decorative motif around the cup.
